description: Source file implementing an email provider for SendGrid within a notification system. Defines the SendGridEmailProvider class which constructs and sends email notifications using SendGrid's Web API v3.

classes.name: SendGridEmailProvider
classes.description: Implements EmailProvider to send emails via SendGrid API, handling API key and 'from' email validation, constructing JSON payload, and making HTTP POST request.

methods.name: SendGridEmailProvider
methods.description: Constructor initializing properties, object mapper, and HTTP client.

methods.name: send
methods.description: Builds and sends an email via SendGrid API, throwing exceptions on failure.
